scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -k -n shared,api,mobile -c cyan,blue,magenta "npm run dev:shared" "npm run api" "npm run mobile"
scripts.test: npm --workspace @rapidtriage/shared run test && npm --workspace apps/api run test && npm --workspace apps/mobile run test
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @rapidtriage/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/api run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/mobile run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --workspace apps/api run lint && npm --workspace apps/mobile run lint
